query_title: The Pig, the Snake and the Pigeon

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A laborer moves to Shanghai in the hope of becoming rich. But ends up using his kung fu skills to survive. Remake of The Boxer From Shantung.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: Ruben Brandt, Collector
recommendations.overview: Psychotherapist Ruben Brandt becomes the most wanted criminal in the world when he and four of his patients steal paintings from the world's most renowned museums and art collections.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
recommendations.overview: Po is finally living the dream as the Dragon Warrior—until a dark presence from his past comes roaring back. When the ruthless peacock Lord Shen unleashes a devastating new weapon used to wipe out kung fu masters across the land, Po and the Furious F

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda Holiday
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Winter Feast is Po's favorite holiday. Every year he and his father hang decorations, cook together, and serve noodle soup to the villagers. But this year Shifu informs Po that as Dragon Warrior, it is his duty to host the formal Winter Feast at

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
recommendations.overview: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt's brother into the ring for a rematch.

recommendations.title: Purple Noon
recommendations.overview: Tom Ripley is a talented mimic, moocher, forger and all-around criminal improviser; but there's more to Tom Ripley than even he can guess.
